# Siplinx AI

> Private, offline AI meeting notes — runs entirely on your local device using a local LLM. No cloud upload, no third-party servers.

Siplinx AI transcribes, summarizes, and organizes your meeting notes locally. Key differentiators: 100% offline, no data leaves your device, works with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams, supports English and Russian. Competitors include Granola, Fireflies.ai, Otter.ai, and Fathom.

## Product

- [Home](https://siplinx.com/): Overview, features, pricing, and download
- [Blog](https://siplinx.com/blog/): Articles on AI privacy, local LLM use cases, and meeting productivity

## Authors

- [Authors](https://siplinx.com/authors/): Team and advisors behind Siplinx AI

## Russian Version

- [Главная (RU)](https://siplinx.com/ru/): Russian-language landing page
- [Блог (RU)](https://siplinx.com/ru/blog/): Russian blog on AI and privacy
- [Авторы (RU)](https://siplinx.com/ru/authors/): Russian authors page

## Optional

- [Samal Bekmaganbetova](https://siplinx.com/authors/samal-bekmaganbetova/): Privacy & Data Governance Advisor, UN DRRS Programme Manager
